title: Fluent Bit Kubernetes Filter Cache Miss Storm
app: Enable elevated log level briefly on affected collectors
spl:
index=fluent sourcetype="fluentbit:log"
| search "kubernetes" AND ("cache" OR "api" OR "429" OR "throttl")
| stats count by host, kube_url_host
| where count>=100
| sort -count
description: API server throttling on metadata lookups delays every container log.
value: Signals need for `Kube_Tag_Prefix`, `use_kubelet`, or reduced refresh interval.
implementation: Scrub bearer tokens from logs; use HEC with TLS.
knownFalsePositives: Collector errors during config changes, target restarts, or transport and credential issues. We read collector logs and compare with the OTel pipeline view.
grandmaExplanation: We read the forwarder and buffer logs for stress and give-ups so we see log loss risk before disks or patience run out.
